concerns.text: Task T014 (Benchmark Accuracy) is missing a clear traceability tag to SC-001. While the description mentions 'SC-001', the task lacks the explicit `[SC-001]` tag or a direct 'See SC-001' anchor required for automated traceability. The task description also conflates 'synthetic benchmark' (allowed for SC-001) with 'primary analysis' constraints, creating ambiguity on whether this task covers the SC-001 requirement or violates the 'no synthetic data' constraint for the main pipeline.

Task T019.5 (Reference ANCOVA) lacks a direct tag for SC-002. The task implements the 'reference R script' logic required by SC-002, but without an explicit `[SC-002]` tag or 'See SC-002' anchor, the coverage link is implicit and fragile. The task description defines the reference logic but does not explicitly state it satisfies the 'pre-validated dataset' requirement of SC-002.

Task T027 (Sensitivity Analysis) is missing the explicit `[SC-004]` tag. The task description details the sensitivity sweep logic (alpha thresholds 0.01, 0.0125, 0.015) which matches SC-004, but the lack of a direct tag means the coverage is not machine-verifiable. The task also references 'contrast labels' from T019 but does not explicitly link to the 'every MFQ subscale contrast' requirement of SC-004.

Tasks T039, T040, and T041 (Test Data Generation) are missing tags for FR-001, FR-006, and FR-007. These tasks create synthetic data to test the abort conditions (missing columns, high exclusion) mandated by FR-001, FR-006, and FR-007. Without explicit `[FR-001]`, `[FR-006]`, `[FR-007]` tags, the coverage of these critical functional requirements by the test data generation tasks is not formally established.

Task T018.5 (MEQ Reliability) contains a stale or ambiguous reference to 'Constitution Principle VI' in the description without a direct tag. While the task covers the requirement to report Cronbach's alpha for MEQ (per Constitution Principle VI), the description should explicitly tag `[Constitution Principle VI]` or `[FR-006]` (if applicable) to ensure traceability. The current phrasing 'fulfilling Constitution Principle VI' is descriptive but not a formal traceability anchor.
